text: Delivered docs/spectral-parity.md (9 capability tables, selection/ordering semantics, Left-vs-Right convergence mapping, 13 spectral-types recommendations + explicit OUT list). Authored by subagent, adversarially reviewed by fresh-context subagent: verdict sound; 1 confirmed error fixed (partial SVD must use Jordan-Wielandt augmented tridiagonal, NOT normal-equation form which squares the condition number and destroys smallest singular values) plus 5 consistency/attribution fixes (phase-a constraint scoped to partial SVD; EigenOrder legality map + InvalidArgument row; bothendsreal/bothendsimag correction; Krylov-Schur vs ARPACK attribution for MATLAB R2017b+; ggsvd3 is Kogbetliantz ggsvp3+tgsja not CSD). Key design consequences for spectral-types: projective GeneralizedEigenvalue(alpha,beta) for infinite eigenvalues; EigenSelection ADT supersedes PRD SpectralSelection (adds IndexRange/ValueInterval/BothEnds); non-convergence is Right+SpectralDiagnostics never Left, with requireConverged opt-in; gale-canonical output ordering (symmetric ascending, SVD descending, conjugate pairs adjacent +imag first); full dense symmetric eig moved INTO phase a (tridiagonal kernel is already a full eigensolver).
